=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (7:21-7:35) TS377025: `Effect.runSync` is called inside an Effect with a separate runtime invocation. In this context, run child Effects with the surrounding runtime, which can be accessed through `Effect.runtime` and `Runtime.runSync`. effect(runEffectInsideEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Use a runtime to run the Effect"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable runEffectInsideEffect for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Use a runtime to run the Effect" ===

--- file:///.src/runEffectInsideEffect_preview.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics runEffectInsideEffect:warning
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const preview = Effect.gen(function*() {
const effectRuntime = yield* Effect.runtime<never>();

  const run = () => Runtime.runSync(effectRuntime, Effect.succeed(1))
  return run()
})
